mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trips (tenant_id, region_id, ride_id, driver_id, rider_id, status_id, start_lat, start_lng, surge_multiplier, started_at, add_date) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{region.id}, #{rideId}, #{driverId}, #{riderId}, #{status.id}, #{startLat}, #{startLng}, #{surgeMultiplier}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM trips WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_info IS NULL
SELECT * FROM trips WHERE ride_id = #{rideId} AND delete_info IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE trips SET status_id = 303, end_lat = #{endLat}, end_lng = #{endLng}, distance_km = #{distanceKm}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, base_fare = #{baseFare}, distance_fare = #{distanceFare}, time_fare = #{timeFare}, total_fare = #{totalFare}, ended_at = NOW(), update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status_id = 301 AND delete_info IS NULL
UPDATE trips SET status_id = #{statusId}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_info IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.total_fare), 0) as total_earnings, COUNT(*) as total_trips, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.started_at::date = CURRENT_DATE THEN t.total_fare ELSE 0 END), 0) as today_earnings, COUNT(CASE WHEN t.started_at::date = CURRENT_DATE THEN 1 END) as today_trips FROM trips t INNER JOIN payments p ON p.trip_id = t.id AND p.status_id = 403 AND p.delete_info IS NULL WHERE t.driver_id = #{driverId} AND t.status_id = 303 AND t.delete_info IS NULL
